rationale: The rule governs civil penalties for late campaign finance reports. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 254.042. CIVIL PENALTY FOR LATE REPORT.
_note: The cited rule (Elec. Code §254.042) concerns campaign finance reporting penalties and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b).
